name: Bacon Artichoke Bundles
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice strips of bacon in half crosswise.
2. Spread a thin layer of mustard on one side of the bacon.
3. Drain the artichoke hearts thoroughly and place one at one end of the bacon strip.
4. If the artichoke hearts are too large, slice them in half before wrapping in bacon.
5. Roll up the bacon around the artichoke and secure with a wooden toothpick.
6. Place the rolled bacon on a broiler pan, ensuring they do not touch each other.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 30-45 minutes, turning once, until the bacon is cooked through.
8. Drain on paper towels and refrigerate until serving time.
9. Reheat on a baking sheet at 350°F (175°C) for 10 minutes or until hot.
Source: "Teasers and Appeasers", an Hors d'Oeuvre cookbook. Reformatted by: CYGNUS, HCPM52C
